name: Irish American Lamb Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown lamb in margarine in a large Dutch oven or heavy saucepan with a tight-fitting cover.
2. Add water, salt, pepper, and thyme. Cover and simmer for 45 minutes.
3. Skim off excess fat.
4. Add potatoes and onions. Simmer covered for 30 minutes.
5. Add peas and mushrooms. Simmer covered for an additional 15 minutes, or until lamb and vegetables are tender.
6. Blend cream into flour; stir into bubbling stew and boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
7. Serve 6 servings.
